name: Goodyear India Limited
summary: Goodyear India Limited engages in the manufacturing and trading of tires, tubes, and flaps under the Goodyear brand in India. The company offers automotive tires, such as farm and commercial truck tires, as well as passenger radial tires. It supplies tires to original equipment manufacturers. The company was incorporated in 1922 and is based in New Delhi, India. Goodyear India Limited is a subsidiary of Goodyear Orient Company (Private) Limited.
